title: NIMASA Director General Seasonal Message
description: The Director General of the Nigerian Maritime Administration and Safety Agency NIMASA Dr Bashir Jamoh OFR is wishing all NIMASA stakeholders, Nigerians and the global maritime community merry Christma
html:
The Director General of the Nigerian Maritime Administration and Safety Agency NIMASA Dr Bashir Jamoh OFR is wishing all NIMASA stakeholders, Nigerians and the global maritime community merry Christmas and a prosperous 2024.

In his words “ 2023 has been a year of new beginnings in the Nigerian maritime industry with the creation of the Marine and Blue Economy Ministry. I believe that this Ministry will help Nigeria navigate successfully to achieve her maritime goals for economic prosperity. I hope collectively we can steer our maritime sector to greater heights in 2024.

I wish you Peace Love and Joy as you celebrate this Yuletide season and all through year 2024
